Theater Department Talent Exam 2024

You can access the 1st stage lists of the Department of Theater Talent Examination here.

Check the lists carefully for your exam entry times. You must be in the exam area half an hour before your exam time. Late candidates will not be admitted to the exam.

Your candidate number has been sent to the e-mail address you applied to the system. You can confirm it by re-entering the application system.

Candidates must present a photo ID card when taking the exam.

Examination Location: Stage KHAS (Kadir Has University – Cibali Campus)
